spiced.situation: Largest independent psychiatry group in the US. Series D completed. Targets medical groups and health systems. Using Reveneer since Jan, getting 10-15 meetings/month. Preferred channel: phone. Team size, ACV, and sales cycle not captured.
spiced.pain: MISSED — Prospect said he's 'always looking for what else is out there.' No deeper pain surfaced beyond mild curiosity about alternatives.
spiced.impact: MISSED — No business outcome connected. Call moved to pricing and differentiators without impact framing.
spiced.critical_event: PARTIAL — Reveneer's 6-month contract review coming up 'relatively soon' but never probed for specific date.
spiced.decision_process: MISSED — Decision maker identity and process never established. Joey agreed to 'circle back in 30 days' with no calendar invite confirmed.

calls.coaching_note: Joey pivoted into pitch mode too early. The prospect handed him a clear opening — a contract review coming up — and Joey never pressed into it.

spiced.situation: CCO at Arkiva (supply chain planning, ~$20M ARR, 80+ global customers, Gartner Magic Quadrant challenger). Week 3 in role. One BD rep handling inbound qualification only. Using Unified for email sequences. Zero outbound today. North America priority; Europe TBD.
spiced.pain: Board mandate to build outbound org. Only 5 SALs from 10 MQLs in Q1. Needs 10-15 SALs/quarter. Pipeline coverage at 1-2x — not enough to hit FY26 plan.
spiced.impact: Insufficient pipeline to hit FY26 number. Everything from now on is 2027 pipeline. Needs 30% bookings growth from 2026 to 2027. 15-20 deals needed to hit annual plan based on current ASP.
spiced.critical_event: PARTIAL — Board mandate already in motion (week 3). On road most of May. Needs to present business case options to management before Memorial Day.
spiced.decision_process: PARTIAL — Parth is CCO and champion. Must present options to management team for approval. Tuesday follow-up confirmed.

calls.coaching_note: Best call of the batch. Strong situation mapping and genuine pain probe. Gap: no news/context opener, ACV never confirmed, management team not identified.

spiced.situation: Data/AI/Lead-to-Cash consulting firm. 15 employees, 3 quota-carrying sellers. ~$3M ARR in 2025, targeting $6M in 2026. Entirely referral/network-led today. ICP: RevOps, SalesOps, CRO, CIO/CDO, procurement. Verticals: SaaS/tech, manufacturing, transportation & logistics. $50M–$250M revenue companies.
spiced.pain: Services company with multi-offer value prop trying to do outbound for the first time. Without a clear lead service to anchor messaging, cold outbound is nearly impossible to execute effectively.
spiced.impact: PARTIAL — Implied: can't double revenue to $6M through referrals alone. Not explicitly quantified in dollar terms.
spiced.critical_event: MISSED — Revenue doubling goal is 2026 but no board meeting, investor deadline, or specific trigger uncovered.
spiced.decision_process: CFO Chad is signee/budget holder. Eric (CEO) is decision maker. Caleb is day-to-day contact. Contract mirrors existing Clickboarding terms. Tuesday 1pm follow-up confirmed.

calls.coaching_note: Strong situation mapping and decision process. Consistent gap: critical event. 'Trying to double revenue this year' is a goal, not a trigger. Coaching question: 'What happens to the business if you're still at $3M in December?'

spiced.situation: Safety Rail Company manufactures physical safety products (not software). A la carte model: inspection, installation, specification. ~$1M/week in revenue. Deals range $1.2K–$260K. Uses independent reps in roofing and industrial markets. Doubling in size annually but resource constrained. Previously used Reveneer when selling direct; stopped when shifted to distributor model 18 months ago.
spiced.pain: Independent reps lean heavily on Staci for product knowledge and can't speak intelligently to solutions independently. Resource constrained — can't keep a backlog of qualified personnel to fulfill growth.
spiced.impact: PARTIAL — Doubling in size but resource constraints limiting growth execution. Not quantified.
spiced.critical_event: MISSED — Staci needs 2-3 weeks to think it over and build a business case for leadership spend approval. No deadline or trigger uncovered.
spiced.decision_process: Staci is champion and operational lead. Needs spend approval from unnamed leadership. May 12 follow-up confirmed.

calls.coaching_note: Call was presentation-heavy — 65% AE talk time. Brian delivered a strong pitch but didn't dig deep enough into pain or impact. Critical event and AE talk time are the two biggest coaching points.

spiced.situation: Zuar, 9-person SaaS company. Few million in ARR. $40K ACV. Transitioning from 100% referral-based to outbound. In Q2 of first outbound strategy. Piloting Memory Blue (high quality/low volume) and Branch 49 (high volume/low quality). SaaS margin ~80%, services ~45-50%.
spiced.pain: Memory Blue delivering few meetings (50% converting to opportunity). Branch 49 delivering many meetings but poor quality/attendance. Not hitting investor-committed targets of 10 scheduled/8 held per month. ~$200K in pipeline but below expectations.
spiced.impact: Built investor plan around meeting targets. Not being met, creating investor accountability pressure. Third month of pilot — actively evaluating options.
spiced.critical_event: MISSED — Third month of pilot is a natural inflection point but Aaron didn't probe for a hard decision deadline.
spiced.decision_process: Whitney appears to be decision maker at this small company. Investors provide accountability but Whitney drives the decision. Wednesday 4/22 follow-up confirmed.

calls.coaching_note: Aaron's strongest prep performance — specific client name-drops with metrics. Memory Blue personal connection was an excellent opener. Consistent gap across all reps: critical event not probed.

spiced.situation: Yellow.ai — conversational AI platform. US market ARR goal $8-10M. Internal SDR team + AI outreach + LinkedIn ads. Used Reveneer 2 years prior (moderate success, stopped for ROI reasons). $150-200K ACV. 70% gross margin. ~50 meetings/quarter currently.
spiced.pain: Lead gen motion is unpredictable — some months good, some bad. Q1 at 80% of $8-10M US ARR plan. Need scalable, repeatable top-of-funnel process to hit plan.
spiced.impact: Missing plan = revised next year projections. Need to scale Q2-Q4 to recover. 35 opportunities needed per quarter at 3-4x pipe coverage to hit $2.5M/quarter target.
spiced.critical_event: MISSED — Q2 recovery need is implicit urgency but Aaron didn't probe for a specific deadline or board review date.
spiced.decision_process: Rashid Khan is head of demand gen/marketing. Will discuss internally and have others join follow-up. Tuesday 8am follow-up confirmed.

calls.coaching_note: Aaron's best discovery call — excellent metrics capture and genuine pain probing ('what happens if you don't get back on track?'). Preparation was the gap — no news hook, no client name drops relevant to Yellow.ai's space.

upcoming.prior_dz_note: PRIOR DZ CLIENT — Inframappa ran a PFP program with DemandZEN (27 meetings, 8.93/mo avg). CEO Moufid was there throughout.
